build.buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm --filter @repo/db db:generate:postgres && pnpm --filter @koga/api build

deploy.startCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm --filter @repo/db db:generate:postgres && pnpm --filter @koga/api start
